{{Infobox construct
| name = Blue Titan
| introduced = The Knight
}}

''See also: [[Blue Titan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Blue Divine Titan]] is a massive, building-sized mechanical entity characterized by its slender build and bright blue armor. Its exterior features smooth plates that connect in a manner resembling an insect's shell, and its helmet is shaped like a hood. This advanced piece of [[Aethertech]] is specifically designed to function alongside elemental magic, particularly water elementalism, though it can accommodate other magical types. The machine is accompanied by a large staff and possesses a resonance cannon that, when activated, triggers various panels, eye projectors, and magic circles to surround the unit in blue light. While it is one of several [[Titans]]—including [[Red]], White, Yellow, and [[Green]] models—the [[Blue]] [[Titan]] has been described as being in a state of disrepair, appearing like a collection of scrap metal at certain points.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Originally designed to compete against the magic of the [[D’Niss]], the [[Blue]] [[Titan]] is a mech that possesses inherent magic resistance. Although the narrator has previously run missions in the unit, they had once dismissed its capabilities. The machine is keyed to water elementalism and utilizes a staff designed to work in tandem with elemental magic. Its combat systems include magic circles that resonate with the [[Aether]] and a resonance cannon that uses eye projectors to shine light.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan]] was meant to compete against the magic of the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator has run missions in the [[Blue Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator dismissed the [[Blue Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan]] is keyed to water elementalism.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan]] is equipped with a resonance cannon.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan]]'s resonance cannon uses projectors in its eyes to shine light.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan]] uses magic circles that resonate with the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan]]'s staff is designed to work with elemental magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan]] is a mech that possesses magic resistance.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Blue Titan]] is described as a pile of scrap.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
